# Pagewell

Pagewell is a framework-agnostic skill pack for coding agents that helps generate, QA, and maintain SEO/GEO pages, free tools, docs, comparisons, landing pages, and private ABM pages as normal code in an existing website repo.

## Important pages
- https://pagewell.dev/
- https://pagewell.dev/products/pagewell
- https://pagewell.dev/use-cases/generate-seo-pages-as-code
- https://pagewell.dev/docs/setup-pagewell
- https://pagewell.dev/alternatives/flint
- https://pagewell.dev/faq/can-i-use-pagewell-with-astro
- https://pagewell.dev/glossary/generative-engine-optimization

## Public tools
- https://pagewell.dev/tools/llms-txt-validator

## Source
- https://github.com/ReScienceLab/pagewell

## Notes
- Pagewell does not host pages or auto-publish production deployments.
- Private or noindex pages are intentionally excluded from this file.
